case_title: LVNV FUNDING LLC VS. ZEN WATANABE ET AL

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ISSUED (TRANSACTION ID # 210064036) TO PLAINTIFF LVNV FUNDING LLC
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR OCT-15-2024 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 210064036) FILED BY PLAINTIFF LVNV FUNDING LLC AS TO DEFENDANT WATANABE, ZEN DOES 1 TO 10 INCLUSIVE NO SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET NOT FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  AUG-26-2024

DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 74346249)
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR OCT-15-2024 CONTINUED TO JAN-14-2025 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
